title: Mixture of Experts
code:
import numpy as np

def moe_gating(x, W_g, top_k=2):
    scores = np.dot(x, W_g)
    top_indices = np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:]
    gate_weights = np.zeros_like(scores)
    top_scores = scores[top_indices]
    exp_scores = np.exp(top_scores - np.max(top_scores))
    gate_weights[top_indices] = exp_scores / np.sum(exp_scores)
    return gate_weights, top_indices

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print('MoE routing initialized.')
